name: Old Fashioned Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup sweet butter, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Butter cookie sheets and set aside.
3. With an electric mixer, beat the butter until soft.
4. Add the sugars and beat until creamy.
5. Add the egg, peanut butter, salt, baking soda, and vanilla extract.
6. Using a rubber spatula, fold the flour into the mixture without overmixing.
7. Roll the dough into small balls and place them on prepared cookie sheets.
8. With a fork, press the balls into flat cookies and bake for 15 to 17 minutes or until crisp and golden.
9. For an added touch, melt some bittersweet chocolate in a double boiler and let it cool slightly. When still pliable, dip one edge of cookies into chocolate.
Yield: 5 dozen
